q: In what year did the Danzig rebellion begin, an armed revolt of the city of Danzig against the election of Stefan Báthory as King of Poland?
e: The Danzig rebellion (1576–1577) was an armed revolt of the Hanseatic city of Danzig (Gdańsk) against the election of Stefan Báthory as King of Poland. The city backed the Habsburg claimant Maximilian II and refused to submit until 1577.

q: In what year did the Aragonese Crusade begin, when Pope Martin IV authorized a French crusade against the Kingdom of Aragon?
